introSection: The Bobcat is a family wooden roller coaster built by The Gravity Group at Six Flags Great Escape in Queensbury, New York, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On August 30, 2023, the addition of Bobcat was announced. It was built on the former site of Alpine Bobsled, which closed in 2023. Its former station was also reused. The lead car was unveiled at the 2023 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

Vertical construction started in early 2024.

On June 1, 2024, Bobcat opened to the public.

fullText:
The Bobcat is a family wooden roller coaster built by The Gravity Group at Six Flags Great Escape in Queensbury, New York, USA.

On August 30, 2023, the addition of Bobcat was announced. It was built on the former site of Alpine Bobsled, which closed in 2023. Its former station was also reused. The lead car was unveiled at the 2023 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

Vertical construction started in early 2024.

On June 1, 2024, Bobcat opened to the public.
